title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 436.400 - Citation of law — applicability
text:
436.400.  Citation of law — applicability. — The provisions of sections 436.400 to 436.520 shall be referenced as the "Missouri Preneed Funeral Contract Act" and shall apply only to preneed contracts entered into, and accounts created on or after, August 28, 2009, unless otherwise specified.
(L. 2009 S.B. 1)
